description.DE: DE: Check that p is prime
description.FR: FR: Contrôler que p est un nombre premier

description.FR: FR: Contrôler que q est un nombre premier

description.DE: DE: Check that the voting options [vo] are prime

description.DE: DE: Check that the voting options are quadratic residues of the group
description.FR: FR: Check that the voting options are quadratic residues of the group

description.DE: DE: Check that the number of primer numbers corresponds to the number of voting options and there are no prime numbers repeated

description.DE: DE: Check that the number of credentials corresponds to the number of voters in the electoral roll

description.FR: FR: Verify the signature of the eCH-0045 file

description.FR: FR: Verify the signature of the eCH-0157 or eCH-0159

description.FR: FR: Verify the signature of the configurationanonymized.xml
